sentences.arabic: كَانَ قِطٌّ صَغِيرٌ اسْمُهُ لَيْثٌ يَعِيشُ فِي حَدِيقَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Bio je mali mačak po imenu Lejt koji je živio u vrtu.
sentences.translationEn: There was a small cat named Layth who lived in a garden.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يَخَافُ مِنَ الْمَطَرِ وَيَجْلِسُ تَحْتَ الشَّجَرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Bojao se kiše i sjedio je ispod stabla.
sentences.translationEn: He was afraid of the rain and sat under the tree.

sentences.arabic: فَتَحَتْ بِنْتٌ صَغِيرَةٌ النَّافِذَةَ وَنَادَتْهُ إِلَى الدَّاخِلِ.
sentences.translation: Jedna mala djevojčica je otvorila prozor i pozvala ga unutra.
sentences.translationEn: A little girl opened the window and called him inside.

sentences.translation: Mačak je ušao i toplo sjedio pored nje.
sentences.translationEn: The cat entered and sat warmly beside her.
